school.mission: To be a leading school in the provision of quality education
school.vision: The vision of Kyengera Parents School, kyengera is to produce devoted learners in academics, moral education and life skills, leadership skills, creativity, and innovation, honest and humble, self-driven with a positive attitude towards quality work.

title: Kyengera Parents School - kyengera
defaultDescription: Kyengera Parents school-kyengera is a number one education service provider within Uganda aiming at developing a holistic child throughout the primary level.
